requirement_topic.en: Certificate of Conformity to RTE INEN — Mandatory pre-import gate (INEN-1 / recognized conformity assessment body)
requirement_topic.zh: RTE INEN合格证书——强制性进口前置门槛（INEN-1/认可的合格评定机构）
requirement_topic.zht: RTE INEN合格證書——強制性進口前置門檻（INEN-1/認可的合格評定機構）

summary.en: Refrigerators imported into Ecuador are regulated products subject to a mandatory Reglamento Tecnico Ecuatoriano (RTE INEN) and must hold a valid Certificate of Conformity (Certificado de Conformidad) before customs clearance. The certificate is issued under the INEN-1 scheme (per-shipment certification of conformity to the RTE) or, more commonly, by a conformity-assessment body recognized/accredited by the Servicio de Acreditacion Ecuatoriano (SAE) under ISO/IEC 17065 (product certification) or ISO/IEC 17020 (inspection). The certificate references the applicable RTE INEN and the underlying NTE INEN/IEC test standards (safety, energy). The importer registers the certificate in the Ecuadorian single-window (VUE / Ventanilla Unica Ecuatoriana) operated through SENAE; goods cannot be nationalized at the port of Guayaquil without it. China-issued CCC certificates are not recognized as equivalent.
summary.zh: 进口至厄瓜多尔的电冰箱属于受强制性厄瓜多尔技术法规（RTE INEN）管辖的产品，须在通关前持有有效的合格证书（Certificado de Conformidad）。该证书依据INEN-1方案（针对每批货物的RTE符合性认证）签发，或更常见地由经厄瓜多尔认可服务局（SAE）依据ISO/IEC 17065（产品认证）或ISO/IEC 17020（检验）认可的合格评定机构签发。证书引用适用的RTE INEN及其依据的NTE INEN/IEC试验标准（安全、能效）。进口商在通过SENAE运行的厄瓜多尔单一窗口（VUE）登记证书；无此证书货物无法在瓜亚基尔港清关入境。中国签发的CCC证书不被认可为等效。
summary.zht: 進口至厄瓜多爾的電冰箱屬於受強制性厄瓜多爾技術法規（RTE INEN）管轄的產品，須在通關前持有有效的合格證書（Certificado de Conformidad）。該證書依據INEN-1方案（針對每批貨物的RTE符合性認證）簽發，或更常見地由經厄瓜多爾認可服務局（SAE）依據ISO/IEC 17065（產品認證）或ISO/IEC 17020（檢驗）認可的合格評定機構簽發。證書引用適用的RTE INEN及其依據的NTE INEN/IEC試驗標準（安全、能效）。進口商在通過SENAE運行的厄瓜多爾單一窗口（VUE）登記證書；無此證書貨物無法在瓜亞基爾港清關入境。中國簽發的CCC證書不被認可為等效。

standards_or_laws: RTE INEN (Reglamento Tecnico Ecuatoriano) applicable to household electrical/refrigerating appliances — mandatory technical regulation requiring Certificate of Conformity
INEN-1 certification scheme (per-shipment Certificate of Conformity to the RTE) administered by INEN
ISO/IEC 17065 (product certification) / ISO/IEC 17020 (inspection) — accreditation basis via Servicio de Acreditacion Ecuatoriano (SAE)
Ley del Sistema Ecuatoriano de la Calidad — legal framework for mandatory conformity assessment of imports

summary.en: In China, household refrigerators are within the scope of China Compulsory Certification (CCC / 3C). A CCC certificate is issued by a designated certification body (e.g. CQC) based on type testing to GB 4706.1 / GB 4706.13 (safety) and factory inspection, and the CCC mark must be affixed before domestic sale. CCC is a domestic mandatory mark recognized only within China; it carries no automatic recognition in Ecuador and cannot be presented in place of a Certificate of Conformity to RTE INEN. There is no Chinese per-shipment import-conformity certificate analogous to INEN-1, because CCC is a product/type approval rather than a consignment certification.
summary.zh: 在中国，家用电冰箱属于中国强制性产品认证（CCC/3C）范围。CCC证书由指定认证机构（如CQC）依据GB 4706.1/GB 4706.13（安全）型式试验及工厂检查签发，CCC标志须在国内销售前加施。CCC为仅在中国境内认可的国内强制性标志；在厄瓜多尔无自动认可，且不能替代RTE INEN合格证书。中国不存在类似INEN-1的逐批进口符合性证书，因为CCC是产品/型式批准而非逐批货物认证。
summary.zht: 在中國，家用電冰箱屬於中國強制性產品認證（CCC/3C）範圍。CCC證書由指定認證機構（如CQC）依據GB 4706.1/GB 4706.13（安全）型式試驗及工廠檢查簽發，CCC標誌須在國內銷售前加施。CCC為僅在中國境內認可的國內強制性標誌；在厄瓜多爾無自動認可，且不能替代RTE INEN合格證書。中國不存在類似INEN-1的逐批進口符合性證書，因為CCC是產品/型式批准而非逐批貨物認證。

standards_or_laws: China Compulsory Certification (CCC / 3C) — mandatory for household refrigerators sold in China; administered by CNCA/SAMR
GB 4706.1 / GB 4706.13 — safety standards underlying CCC type testing for refrigerating appliances

gap.en: The conformity route is entirely different. Ecuador requires a Certificate of Conformity to a mandatory RTE INEN, issued by an INEN/SAE-recognized body, registered by the Ecuadorian importer in the VUE single-window before nationalization at Guayaquil. A Chinese CCC certificate is not accepted and cannot be converted. Exporters must: (1) identify the exact RTE INEN applicable to the refrigerator model; (2) arrange testing/assessment by a recognized body (often using IEC 60335-2-24 and INEN energy test reports, with possible acceptance of accredited foreign test data via the importer's certifier); (3) supply technical documentation and Spanish-language labelling; and (4) work through an in-country importer who holds the certificate and clears customs. Per-shipment (INEN-1) certification can add cost and lead time versus a one-time type approval.
gap.zh: 符合性途径完全不同。厄瓜多尔要求依据强制性RTE INEN的合格证书，由INEN/SAE认可的机构签发，并由厄瓜多尔进口商在瓜亚基尔入境前在VUE单一窗口登记。中国CCC证书不被接受且无法转换。出口商须：（1）确定适用于该冰箱型号的确切RTE INEN；（2）安排由认可机构进行检测/评定（通常采用IEC 60335-2-24及INEN能效测试报告，认证方可能接受经认可的境外测试数据）；（3）提供技术文件及西班牙文标签；（4）通过持证并办理清关的境内进口商运作。逐批（INEN-1）认证相比一次性型式批准会增加成本和周期。
gap.zht: 符合性途徑完全不同。厄瓜多爾要求依據強制性RTE INEN的合格證書，由INEN/SAE認可的機構簽發，並由厄瓜多爾進口商在瓜亞基爾入境前在VUE單一窗口登記。中國CCC證書不被接受且無法轉換。出口商須：（1）確定適用於該冰箱型號的確切RTE INEN；（2）安排由認可機構進行檢測/評定（通常採用IEC 60335-2-24及INEN能效測試報告，認證方可能接受經認可的境外測試數據）；（3）提供技術文件及西班牙文標籤；（4）通過持證並辦理清關的境內進口商運作。逐批（INEN-1）認證相比一次性型式批准會增加成本和週期。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — Certificate of Conformity to the applicable RTE INEN is legally required and verified at customs (Guayaquil/SENAE) before nationalization; CCC is not accepted
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC (3C) certification and mark required before domestic sale in China; administered by CNCA/SAMR

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A Certificate of Conformity to the applicable RTE INEN, issued by an INEN/SAE-recognized body and registered by the Ecuadorian importer, is a hard customs gate at Guayaquil. Chinese CCC certification does not substitute. Exporters should confirm the exact RTE INEN and accepted test-data routes with the certifying body and importer before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 依据适用RTE INEN、由INEN/SAE认可机构签发并由厄瓜多尔进口商登记的合格证书，是瓜亚基尔的强制性海关门槛。中国CCC认证不能替代。出口商应在出货前与认证机构及进口商确认确切的RTE INEN及可接受的测试数据途径。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 依據適用RTE INEN、由INEN/SAE認可機構簽發並由厄瓜多爾進口商登記的合格證書，是瓜亞基爾的強制性海關門檻。中國CCC認證不能替代。出口商應在出貨前與認證機構及進口商確認確切的RTE INEN及可接受的測試數據途徑。

requirement_topic.en: In-country importer/registrant, Spanish labelling, and absence of an EU-style horizontal regime (no RoHS / battery / outdoor-noise)
requirement_topic.zh: 境内进口商/注册人、西班牙文标签，及无欧盟式横向法规（无RoHS/电池/室外噪声）
requirement_topic.zht: 境內進口商/註冊人、西班牙文標籤，及無歐盟式橫向法規（無RoHS/電池/室外噪聲）

summary.en: Ecuador requires an in-country legal entity (the importer) to act as the registrant and customs declarant; there is no foreign-manufacturer self-declaration route equivalent to an EU manufacturer/authorised-representative DoC. The importer holds the Certificate of Conformity, registers in the VUE/SENAE single window, and is the accountable party for market surveillance. Product markings and the commercial/energy information presented to consumers must be in Spanish, including rated voltage/frequency, capacity, and the energy label. Ecuador does not operate an EU-style horizontal substance or product-stewardship regime for refrigerators: there is no RoHS-equivalent restriction-of-hazardous-substances regulation, no battery directive, and no outdoor-noise emission regulation analogous to EU 2000/14/EC. Compliance is driven by the vertical RTE INEN (safety + energy) rather than horizontal directives.
summary.zh: 厄瓜多尔要求由境内法人实体（进口商）担任注册人及报关人；不存在等同于欧盟制造商/授权代表符合性声明（DoC）的外国制造商自我声明途径。进口商持有合格证书，在VUE/SENAE单一窗口登记，并是市场监管的责任主体。向消费者呈现的产品标志及商业/能效信息须使用西班牙文，包括额定电压/频率、容量及能效标签。厄瓜多尔对电冰箱不实行欧盟式横向物质或产品管理法规：没有等同于RoHS的有害物质限制法规，没有电池指令，也没有类似欧盟2000/14/EC的室外噪声排放法规。合规由纵向RTE INEN（安全+能效）驱动，而非横向指令。
summary.zht: 厄瓜多爾要求由境內法人實體（進口商）擔任註冊人及報關人；不存在等同於歐盟製造商/授權代表符合性聲明（DoC）的外國製造商自我聲明途徑。進口商持有合格證書，在VUE/SENAE單一窗口登記，並是市場監管的責任主體。向消費者呈現的產品標誌及商業/能效資訊須使用西班牙文，包括額定電壓/頻率、容量及能效標籤。厄瓜多爾對電冰箱不實行歐盟式橫向物質或產品管理法規：沒有等同於RoHS的有害物質限制法規，沒有電池指令，也沒有類似歐盟2000/14/EC的室外噪聲排放法規。合規由縱向RTE INEN（安全+能效）驅動，而非橫向指令。

standards_or_laws: Servicio Nacional de Aduana del Ecuador (SENAE) — import registration via VUE (Ventanilla Unica Ecuatoriana) single window
Spanish-language labelling and consumer-information requirements (Ley Organica de Defensa del Consumidor) — rated voltage/frequency, capacity, energy label in Spanish
No RoHS-equivalent, battery, or outdoor-noise horizontal regulation for refrigerators in Ecuador (vertical RTE INEN governs)

summary.en: China's domestic market access is based on CCC product certification plus the China Energy Label, with the Chinese manufacturer (or its domestic certificate holder) accountable; there is no requirement for a foreign in-country importer because the manufacturer is domestic. Chinese labelling for the domestic market is in Chinese and references GB standards and the 220 V / 50 Hz grid. China does have its own RoHS regime (the Administrative Measures on the Restriction of the Use of Hazardous Substances in Electrical and Electronic Products, GB/T 26572) applying to EEE domestically — but it is a Chinese regime and does not satisfy any foreign requirement; Ecuador imposes no matching obligation, so this is not a market-access gate for Ecuador.
summary.zh: 中国国内市场准入以CCC产品认证加中国能效标识为基础，由中国制造商（或其国内证书持有人）承担责任；因制造商即境内主体，无需外国境内进口商。中国面向国内市场的标签为中文，引用GB标准及220V/50Hz电网。中国确有自己的RoHS制度（《电器电子产品有害物质限制使用管理办法》，GB/T 26572），在国内适用于电子电气产品——但这是中国制度，不满足任何外国要求；厄瓜多尔无对应义务，故对厄瓜多尔而言不构成市场准入门槛。
summary.zht: 中國國內市場准入以CCC產品認證加中國能效標識為基礎，由中國製造商（或其國內證書持有人）承擔責任；因製造商即境內主體，無需外國境內進口商。中國面向國內市場的標籤為中文，引用GB標準及220V/50Hz電網。中國確有自己的RoHS制度（《電器電子產品有害物質限制使用管理辦法》，GB/T 26572），在國內適用於電子電氣產品——但這是中國制度，不滿足任何外國要求；厄瓜多爾無對應義務，故對厄瓜多爾而言不構成市場准入門檻。

standards_or_laws: CCC (3C) certification + China Energy Label — domestic market access basis (manufacturer accountable)
China RoHS — Administrative Measures on Restriction of Hazardous Substances in EEE / GB/T 26572 (domestic regime only; not an Ecuador requirement)

gap.en: Two structural points for exporters. (1) Importer dependency: a Chinese exporter cannot self-declare into Ecuador — an in-country importer must hold the Certificate of Conformity, register in VUE/SENAE, and provide Spanish labelling and consumer information. The exporter must contract a reliable importer and supply the technical file, Spanish artwork, and 120/220 V 60 Hz ratings. (2) No EU-style horizontal burdens: unlike the EU, Ecuador imposes no RoHS-equivalent hazardous-substance restriction, no battery regulation, and no outdoor-noise emission regulation on refrigerators. This means the EU-specific RoHS/EPREL/F-Gas compliance tasks do not transfer; the Ecuador effort concentrates on the RTE INEN Certificate of Conformity, IEC 60335-2-24 safety, the INEN/MEER energy label, R-600a documentation, and Spanish labelling. Exporters should not assume EU RoHS work creates any Ecuador credit, and should not assume the absence of RoHS removes the (separate, mandatory) RTE INEN safety/energy obligations.
gap.zh: 出口商面对两个结构性要点。（1）依赖进口商：中国出口商不能自我声明进入厄瓜多尔——须由境内进口商持有合格证书、在VUE/SENAE登记，并提供西班牙文标签及消费者信息。出口商须签约可靠进口商并提供技术文件、西班牙文图样及120/220V 60Hz额定值。（2）无欧盟式横向负担：与欧盟不同，厄瓜多尔对电冰箱不施加等同RoHS的有害物质限制、电池法规或室外噪声排放法规。因此欧盟特有的RoHS/EPREL/氟气体合规任务不可移植；厄瓜多尔的工作集中于RTE INEN合格证书、IEC 60335-2-24安全、INEN/MEER能效标签、R-600a文件及西班牙文标签。出口商不应假定欧盟RoHS工作可在厄瓜多尔获得任何抵免，也不应假定无RoHS就免除（单独且强制的）RTE INEN安全/能效义务。
gap.zht: 出口商面對兩個結構性要點。（1）依賴進口商：中國出口商不能自我聲明進入厄瓜多爾——須由境內進口商持有合格證書、在VUE/SENAE登記，並提供西班牙文標籤及消費者資訊。出口商須簽約可靠進口商並提供技術文件、西班牙文圖樣及120/220V 60Hz額定值。（2）無歐盟式橫向負擔：與歐盟不同，厄瓜多爾對電冰箱不施加等同RoHS的有害物質限制、電池法規或室外噪聲排放法規。因此歐盟特有的RoHS/EPREL/氟氣體合規任務不可移植；厄瓜多爾的工作集中於RTE INEN合格證書、IEC 60335-2-24安全、INEN/MEER能效標籤、R-600a文件及西班牙文標籤。出口商不應假定歐盟RoHS工作可在厄瓜多爾獲得任何抵免，也不應假定無RoHS就免除（單獨且強制的）RTE INEN安全/能效義務。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (importer + Spanish labelling) — in-country importer/registrant and Spanish consumer information required; note: no RoHS/battery/outdoor-noise horizontal regime exists for refrigerators in Ecuador
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (domestic) — CCC + China Energy Label with manufacturer accountable; China RoHS applies domestically but is not an Ecuador requirement

source.publisher: Servicio Nacional de Aduana del Ecuador (SENAE)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Market access into Ecuador runs through an in-country importer who holds the RTE INEN Certificate of Conformity and provides Spanish labelling; there is no foreign self-declaration route. Ecuador imposes no EU-style RoHS, battery, or outdoor-noise regime on refrigerators, so EU horizontal-compliance work does not transfer and its absence does not remove the mandatory RTE INEN safety/energy obligations.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 进入厄瓜多尔须通过持有RTE INEN合格证书并提供西班牙文标签的境内进口商；不存在外国自我声明途径。厄瓜多尔对电冰箱不施加欧盟式RoHS、电池或室外噪声法规，故欧盟横向合规工作不可移植，其缺失也不免除强制性RTE INEN安全/能效义务。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 進入厄瓜多爾須通過持有RTE INEN合格證書並提供西班牙文標籤的境內進口商；不存在外國自我聲明途徑。厄瓜多爾對電冰箱不施加歐盟式RoHS、電池或室外噪聲法規，故歐盟橫向合規工作不可移植，其缺失也不免除強制性RTE INEN安全/能效義務。
